## Type of change / 变更类型

<!-- PR_TYPE:new feature -->

- [ ] bugfix: Bug fix / 问题修复
- [ ] new feature: New feature / 新功能
- [ ] refactor: Code refactoring / 重构
- [ ] breaking: Breaking change / 破坏性变更
- [ ] docs: Documentation / 文档更新


## Testing / 测试

- Integration Version / 集成版本:

## Checklist / 自检清单

- [ ] Code follows project standards
      代码符合项目规范

- [ ] No debug code or unrelated files
      无调试代码或无关文件

PR Rules / PR 规范

<type>: <description>

Examples:
feat: add login support
fix: resolve timeout issue
docs: update README


Branch:
Do not submit from main/master

PR_TYPE:
Select one type below.

CI checks:

✓ Branch
